projectDescription: A minimalist Tauri-based desktop AI assistant that gives instant access to AI models via a global keyboard shortcut.
keyFeatures: Global keyboard shortcut (Alt+Space) to summon an instant AI assistant overlay
Multi-turn conversational AI with streaming responses
Support for multiple AI providers (OpenAI-compatible and Anthropic)
MCP (Model Context Protocol) tool integration for agentic workflows
Quick search panel for history and past conversations
File and image attachment support for multimodal queries
Transparent, borderless floating window that stays on top
Local SQLite database for persistent conversation history
System tray integration with autostart support
Monaco editor for rich code rendering
publicApiSurface: useSettingsStore() — Pinia store for app settings
useMcpStore() — Pinia store for MCP server state
